center.name: 丹麦
center.summary: 丹麦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括白颊黑雁、粉脚雁、翻石鹬等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | title=Impacts of highly pathogenic avian influenza (HPAI) on a Barnacle Goose Branta leucopsis population wintering on the Solway Firth, UK | journal=Bird Study | date=2025-02-07 | issn=0006-3657 | doi=10.1080/00063657.2024.2443225 | pages=1–12| doi-access=free }} * Breeding on Novaya Zemlya, Dolgy Island, Kanin Peninsula, Yugorsky Peninsula and the Barents Sea coastline in the Russian Arctic, wintering in the Wadden Sea area in southwest Denmark, northwest Germany and the Netherlands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is migratory, wintering in northwest Europe, especially Ireland, Great Britain, the Netherlands, and western Denmark

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: interpres breeds in western Alaska, Ellesmere Island, Greenland, Norway, Denmark, Sweden, Finland, Estonia and northern Russia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Long-eared owls wintering in Denmark were found to be heavily biased towards females, also there is a bias towards females in winter surveys in other areas such as southern Sweden

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species also occupies a majority of Finland and Scandinavia, where most broadly found in Norway, somewhat more spottily in Sweden and in Denmark it is found widely in Jutland (absent from the islands).Cramp, S., Simmons, K
